tech_news.title: GTA 6 Hacker Found Competent for Retrial After Indefinite Sentence to Secure Hospital - IGN
tech_news.description: The hacker behind the massive GTA 6 leak in September 2022 has been released from indefinite imprisonment at a secure hospital and is now awaiting a retrial.
